title: Venezuelan Breakfast Patties (Cachapas)
description: Traditional Venezuelan breakfast dish made with cornmeal pancakes filled with melted cheese. A hearty and delicious start to your day.
instructions: Combine masarepa and water in a large bowl. Let it rest for 10 minutes.
Add eggs, salt, and black pepper to the bowl. Mix well.
Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the mixture onto the skillet.
Cook for 4-5 minutes or until the bottom is golden brown.
Flip the patties and cook for another 4-5 minutes or until golden brown.
Meanwhile, melt the cheese in a saucepan over low heat.
Assemble the cachapas by placing a spoonful of cheese on top of a cooked patty.
Fold the patty in half to enclose the cheese.
